monsters.name: Scope Creep Dragon
monsters.description: An ever-growing beast that devours timelines and budgets.

monsters.name: The HiPPO
monsters.description: Highest Paid Person's Opinion overrides all data and research.

monsters.name: Technical Debt Golem
monsters.description: Slow, immovable, and gets bigger every sprint you ignore it.

monsters.name: Vanity Metrics Phantom
monsters.description: Looks impressive but provides zero actionable insight.

monsters.name: Feature Factory
monsters.description: Churns out features nobody asked for at alarming speed.

monsters.name: Stakeholder Hydra
monsters.description: Cut one requirement and two more grow in its place.

monsters.name: Churn Wraith
monsters.description: Silently steals your users in the night. Hard to detect until too late.

monsters.name: Analysis Paralysis Sphinx
monsters.description: Asks endless questions, never lets you ship anything.

monsters.name: Burnout Phoenix
monsters.description: Burns bright then crashes. Rises again to burn your whole team.

monsters.name: MVP Mimic
monsters.description: Disguises itself as a real product. Fools investors but not users.

monsters.name: AI Hype Beast
monsters.description: Promises to solve everything with AI. Delivers a chatbot wrapper.

monsters.name: Reorg Tornado
monsters.description: Strikes without warning. Scatters teams across the org chart.

monsters.name: Competitor Shadow
monsters.description: Always one step ahead. Copies your roadmap before you ship.

monsters.name: Sev-1 Incident
monsters.description: Pages you at 3am. All hands on deck. Nothing else matters.
